# Generated by scripts/generate_variable_harvests.py; do not edit by hand.

apply_regional_harvest_effect = {
	sub_continent:western_europe = {
		random_list = {
			20 = {
				pp_apply_western_europe_harvest_shock_bad = yes
			}
			60 = {
				pp_apply_western_europe_harvest_shock_neutral = yes
			}
			20 = {
				pp_apply_western_europe_harvest_shock_good = yes
			}
		}
	}

pp_apply_australasia_harvest_shock_bad = {
	region:australia_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = { subcontinent = australasia }
	}
	region:new_zealand_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = { subcontinent = australasia }
	}
}

pp_apply_australasia_harvest_shock_neutral = {
	region:australia_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = australasia }
	}
	region:new_zealand_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = australasia }
	}
}

pp_apply_australasia_harvest_shock_good = {
	region:australia_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = australasia }
	}
	region:new_zealand_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = australasia }
	}
}

	region:central_africa_region = {

	region:kongo_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = { subcontinent = central_africa }
	}
}

	}
	region:canada_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = north_america }
	}
	region:caribbean_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = north_america }
	}
	region:central_america_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = north_america }
	}
	region:east_coast_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = north_america }
	}
	region:great_plains_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = north_america }
	}
	region:mesoamerica_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = north_america }
	}
	region:west_coast_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = north_america }
	}
}

pp_apply_north_america_harvest_shock_good = {
	region:alaska_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = north_america }
	}
	region:aridoamerica_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = north_america }
	}
	region:canada_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = north_america }
	}
	region:caribbean_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = north_america }
	}
	region:central_america_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = north_america }
	}
	region:east_coast_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = north_america }
	}
	region:great_plains_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = north_america }
	}
	region:mesoamerica_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = north_america }
	}
	region:west_coast_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = north_america }
	}
}

pp_apply_north_asia_harvest_shock_bad = {
	region:east_siberia_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = { subcontinent = north_asia }
	}
	region:west_siberia_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = { subcontinent = north_asia }
	}
}

	region:east_siberia_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = north_asia }
	}
	region:west_siberia_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = north_asia }
	}
}

	region:east_siberia_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = north_asia }
	}
	region:west_siberia_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = north_asia }
	}
}

	}
	region:polynesia_region = {

	}

	}
	region:micronesia_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = pacific_islands }
	}
	region:polynesia_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = pacific_islands }
	}
}

	region:polynesia_region = {

	region:andes_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = { subcontinent = south_america }
	}
	region:brazil_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = { subcontinent = south_america }
	}
	region:chaco_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = { subcontinent = south_america }
	}
	region:colombia_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = { subcontinent = south_america }
	}
	region:la_plata_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = { subcontinent = south_america }
	}

		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = south_america }

	region:chaco_region = {

	region:colombia_region = {

		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = south_asia }
	}
	region:central_india_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = south_asia }
	}
	region:deccan_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = south_asia }
	}
	region:hindustan_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = south_asia }
	}
	region:western_india_region = {

	}
	region:zimbabwe_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = { subcontinent = southern_africa }
	}
}

	}
	region:zimbabwe_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = southern_africa }
	}
}

		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = southern_africa }

	region:zimbabwe_region = {

	}
	region:sahel_region = {

	}
}

	region:guinea_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = west_africa }
	}
	region:sahel_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = west_africa }
	}
}

pp_apply_west_africa_harvest_shock_good = {
	region:guinea_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = west_africa }
	}
	region:sahel_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = west_africa }
	}
}

pp_apply_western_europe_harvest_shock_bad = {
	region:france_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:great_britain_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:iberia_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:ireland_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:italy_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:north_atlantic_islands_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:north_german_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:scandinavian_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:south_german_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
}

pp_apply_western_europe_harvest_shock_neutral = {
	region:france_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:great_britain_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:iberia_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:ireland_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:italy_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:north_atlantic_islands_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:north_german_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:scandinavian_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:south_german_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
}

pp_apply_western_europe_harvest_shock_good = {
	region:france_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:great_britain_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:iberia_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:ireland_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:italy_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:north_atlantic_islands_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:north_german_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:scandinavian_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
	region:south_german_region = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = { subcontinent = western_europe }
	}
}

pp_roll_region_harvest_for_bad_shock = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			any_location_in_region = {
				OR = {
					has_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_abysmal
					has_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_very_poor
					has_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_poor
				}
			}
		}
		pp_roll_region_harvest_bad_persistent = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			any_location_in_region = {
				OR = {
					has_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_good
					has_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_very_good
					has_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_bountiful
				}
			}
		}
		pp_roll_region_harvest_neutral = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ }
	}
	else = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_shock_bad = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ }
	}
}

pp_roll_region_harvest_for_neutral_shock = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			any_location_in_region = {
				OR = {
					has_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_abysmal
					has_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_very_poor
					has_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_poor
				}
			}
		}
		pp_roll_region_harvest_memory_bad = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			any_location_in_region = {
				OR = {
					has_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_good
					has_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_very_good
					has_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_bountiful
				}
			}
		}
		pp_roll_region_harvest_memory_good = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ }
	}
	else = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_neutral = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ }
	}
}

pp_roll_region_harvest_for_good_shock = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			any_location_in_region = {
				OR = {
					has_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_abysmal
					has_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_very_poor
					has_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_poor
				}
			}
		}
		pp_roll_region_harvest_neutral = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			any_location_in_region = {
				OR = {
					has_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_good
					has_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_very_good
					has_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_bountiful
				}
			}
		}
		pp_roll_region_harvest_good_persistent = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ }
	}
	else = {
		pp_roll_region_harvest_shock_good = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ }
	}
}

pp_roll_region_harvest_neutral = {
	random_list = {
		5 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = abysmal }
		}
		10 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = very_poor }
		}
		20 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = poor }
		}
		30 = {
			clear_variable_harvest_effects_in_region = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ }
		}
		20 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = good }
		}
		10 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = very_good }
		}
		5 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = bountiful }
		}
	}
}

pp_roll_region_harvest_shock_bad = {
	random_list = {
		7 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = abysmal }
		}
		13 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = very_poor }
		}
		25 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = poor }
		}
		30 = {
			clear_variable_harvest_effects_in_region = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ }
		}
		15 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = good }
		}
		7 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = very_good }
		}
		3 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = bountiful }
		}
	}
}

pp_roll_region_harvest_shock_good = {
	random_list = {
		3 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = abysmal }
		}
		7 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = very_poor }
		}
		15 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = poor }
		}
		30 = {
			clear_variable_harvest_effects_in_region = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ }
		}
		25 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = good }
		}
		13 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = very_good }
		}
		7 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = bountiful }
		}
	}
}

pp_roll_region_harvest_memory_bad = {
	random_list = {
		6 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = abysmal }
		}
		12 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = very_poor }
		}
		24 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = poor }
		}
		35 = {
			clear_variable_harvest_effects_in_region = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ }
		}
		15 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = good }
		}
		6 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = very_good }
		}
		2 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = bountiful }
		}
	}
}

pp_roll_region_harvest_memory_good = {
	random_list = {
		2 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = abysmal }
		}
		6 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = very_poor }
		}
		15 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = poor }
		}
		35 = {
			clear_variable_harvest_effects_in_region = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ }
		}
		24 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = good }
		}
		12 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = very_good }
		}
		6 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = bountiful }
		}
	}
}

pp_roll_region_harvest_bad_persistent = {
	random_list = {
		9 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = abysmal }
		}
		15 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = very_poor }
		}
		26 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = poor }
		}
		28 = {
			clear_variable_harvest_effects_in_region = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ }
		}
		13 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = good }
		}
		6 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = very_good }
		}
		3 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = bountiful }
		}
	}
}

pp_roll_region_harvest_good_persistent = {
	random_list = {
		3 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = abysmal }
		}
		6 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = very_poor }
		}
		13 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = poor }
		}
		28 = {
			clear_variable_harvest_effects_in_region = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ }
		}
		26 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = good }
		}
		15 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = very_good }
		}
		9 = {
			pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ severity = bountiful }
		}
	}
}

pp_apply_region_harvest_outcome = {
	clear_variable_harvest_effects_in_region = { subcontinent = $subcontinent$ }
	every_location_in_region = {
		limit = {
			is_ownable = yes
			province ?= {
				NOT = { has_province_modifier = russian_famine }
			}
		}
		add_location_modifier = {
			modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_$severity$
			months = 13
			mode = replace
		}
	}
}

clear_variable_harvest_effects_in_region = {
	every_location_in_region = {
		limit = { is_ownable = yes }
		remove_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_abysmal
		remove_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_very_poor
		remove_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_poor
		remove_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_good
		remove_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_very_good
		remove_location_modifier = pp_harvest_$subcontinent$_bountiful
	}
}
